# AI Pulse — Model Radar

> Track AI models from 170+ companies in one clean, zero-build dashboard — and update it yourself, any time, to catch every new model as it drops. No server, no install — just open and go.

## What is AI Pulse?

AI Pulse — Model Radar is a single-file HTML dashboard that brings together everything you need to compare AI models in one place: parameters, context window, pricing, benchmarks, licensing, and community traction — without digging through a dozen leaderboards and provider docs.

## Key Features

- 600+ models from 170+ companies
- Side-by-side model comparison (export as PDF, PNG, CSV)
- Provider Radar — see where a model is free across 10+ APIs
- Cost analysis — input/output pricing per 1K and 1M tokens
- 10 interactive charts — trends, categories, benchmarks
- Instant search and smart filters
- Dark/light themes, grid views, responsive layout
- Self-updating Python pipeline (no extra packages)

## Who is it for?

- AI researchers and engineers
- Developers deciding which model to use
- Startup founders (cost analysis feature)
- Students and academics
- Content creators and technical writers covering AI news
- Product managers evaluating which model to integrate

## How it works

1. Download the HTML file, seed data, and Python tools
2. Open the HTML file in your browser — 600+ models are already loaded
3. Run the update script to pull in new models as they release

## Pricing

- Personal Edition: $29 (one-time, single user, lifetime access)
- Team Edition: $99 (one-time, multiple users)

## Technical Details

- Single HTML file, zero backend, no install required
- Python 3.8+ for update pipeline (no extra packages)
- Data sources: HuggingFace, OpenRouter
- License: Commercial (Personal/Team editions)
